description:
Start building now with AWS! https://aws.amazon.com/free/?trk=el_a134p000006gAn3AAE&trkCampaign=AWS_Free_Tier&sc_channel=el&sc_campaign=Akatsuki_YouTube_Episode_to_AWS_Free_Tier&sc_outcome=Training_and_Certification&sc_geo=NAMER&sc_country=mult&all-free-tier.sort-by=item.additionalFields.SortRank&all-free-tier.sort-order=asc

Learn how Akatsuki built and operates game servers in 700+ containers on Amazon ECS to handle 1M requests/min. In this episode, we talk about their architecture for rapid scaling with Amazon ECS, how they perform their system testing in order to confirm the stability, and what they are planning to improve the architecture. 

~Filmed prior to Covid-19~

#AWS
fulltitle: Akatsuki: Building Stable and Scalable Large Scale Game Servers with Amazon ECS (Japanese)
